column12: UI looks pretty okay with a black theme and purple accent colors. It functions properly with audio effects, and while the "spinning" animation is more like rapid switching of images, it does indeed display correctly. Has a reset button, and token counts are actually calculated correctly, also bonus has achievements.
column13: Code is cleaner than before and formatted into different sections with comments.

column12: UI looks good with a purple-blue background. It also functions good with audio and the improved spinning animation. It correctly calculates tokens correctly and has a reset button, with a bonus of a section for AI quotes. After more testing, it actually ended up broken and spun infinitely.
column13: Similar to the other refinement, it has sectioned the code with comments, which does make it better to read.

column12: UI looks also decent with a black background and purple trim. For ONE spin, it actually has a good spinning animation, but for any others it will be similar to other refinements of switching images. It has audio and a reset button, and it explains all the match possibilities.
column13: Very similar to other refinements, having more comments and sectioning code with comments.

column12: UI somewhat looks like some of the nonrefined candidates, but it still somewhat follows the color scheme. It does have a decent "spinning" animation, where it rapid switches. A little less functionality where it can't change the bet amount, but does explain the possible matches.
column13: Code is structured similarly where comments section different parts of the functionality.

column12: The UI looked pretty good, with the black background and purple trim. The spinning animation does actually work much better, BUT the audio will break as well as the token counts bugging out and not letting me bet even though I had some. It has a reset game and a modify bet setting.
column13: While it has comments and kind of strucutres, it's closer to the first candidates rather than refinements. It doesn't section code with comments.
